nasb.text: O Lord, hear! O Lord, forgive! O Lord, listen and take action! For Your own sake, O my God, do not delay, because Your city and Your people are called by Your name.”

esv.text: O Lord, hear; O Lord, forgive. O Lord, pay attention and act. Delay not, for your own sake, O my God, because your city and your people are called by your name.”

cnv.text: 主啊！求你垂聽。主啊！求你赦免。主啊！求你應允而行。我的　神啊！為了你自己的緣故，求你不要耽延。因為你的城和你的子民都是稱為你名下的。”

ccb.text: 主啊，求你垂听！主啊，求你赦免！主啊，求你应允，立刻行动！我的上帝啊，为你自己的缘故，求你不要耽延，因为这城和这民都属于你的名下。”
